passive.name: Soul Eater
passive.description: Nasus drains his foe's spiritual energy, giving him bonus Life Steal.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Nasus''' gains {{sti|life steal|{{pp|key=%|12 to 24 for 3|1 to 13}} [[life steal]]}}.

Q.name: Siphoning Strike
Q.description: Nasus strikes his foe, dealing damage and increasing the power of his future Siphoning Strikes if he slays his target.
Q.tooltip: Nasus' next Attack deals {{ totaldamage }} physical damage. Killing an enemy with this Attack permanently increases its damage by {{ basicstacks }}, increased to {{ bigstacks }} against champions, large minions and large jungle monsters.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{cis|Nasus}} next basic attack within a period will gain {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}} and deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} based on the amount of {{as|Siphoning Strike}} stacks.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If this attack kills the target, '''Nasus''' generates permanent stacks of {{as|Siphoning Strike}}, increased against {{tip|champions}}, large {{tip|minions}}, and large {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nasus''' empowers his next [[basic attack]] within 10 seconds to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, gain {{sti|range|50 '''bonus''' range}}, and deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Bonus Physical Damage|{{ap|40 to 120}} {{as|(+ ''Siphoning Strike'' stacks)|Siphoning Strike}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: If ''Siphoning Strike'' kills the target, '''Nasus''' permanently gains {{as|3 stacks|Siphoning Strike}}, increased to {{as|12|Siphoning Strike}} if the target is a {{tip|champion}}, large {{tip|minion}}, or large {{tip|monster}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Siphoning Strike {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Nasus'''' basic attack timer.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Nasus''' can gain ''Siphoning Strike'' {{as|stacks|Siphoning Strike}} by killing any enemy unit, this includes {{tip|champions}}, {{tip|minions}}, {{tip|monsters}}, {{tip|wards}}, {{tip|turrets}}, and {{tip|pets}}. 
** [[Jungle plants]] and [[structures]] that are not turrets (e.g. [[inhibitors]]) will not grant {{as|stacks|Siphoning Strike}}.
* ''Siphoning Strike'' will not generate {{as|stacks|Siphoning Strike}} from secondary units killed by other effects (e.g. {{ii|Tiamat}}).
* {{stil|Life steal}} applies to the entire damage of ''Siphoning Strike''
* ''Siphoning Strike'' can {{tip|critically strike}}, but only the {{as|100% AD|attack damage}} and flat bonus damage from ranks are increased. The bonus damage from {{as|stacks|Siphoning Strike}} does '''not''' factor into its critical damage.
* ''Siphoning Strike'' will trigger {{iis|Tear of the Goddess}} {{sbc|Mana Charge}}.

W.name: Wither
W.description: Nasus ages an enemy champion, decelerating their Move Speed and Attack Speed over time.
W.tooltip: Nasus ages a champion, Slowing them by {{ slowbase }}%, increasing to {{ maxslowtooltiponly }}% over {{ duration }} seconds. Their Attack Speed is also reduced by {{ attackspeedslowmult*100 }}% of the Slow.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Nasus}} ages the target enemy champion for a few seconds, gradually {{tip|slow|slowing}} and {{tip|cripple|crippling}} them over the duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nasus''' ages the target enemy champion for 5 seconds, {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 35% and {{tip|cripple|crippling}} them by{{ft|75% of that amount,|{{ap|35*0.75}}%,}}both increasing every second over the duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Maximum Slow|{{ap|35+3*4 to 35+15*4}}%|Additional Slow Per Second|{{ap|3 to 15}}%}}
{{st|Maximum Cripple|{{ap|(35+3*4)*0.75 to (35+15*4)*0.75}}%|Additional Cripple Per Second|{{ap|3*0.75 to 15*0.75}}%}}

E.name: Spirit Fire
E.description: Nasus unleashes a spirit flame at a location, dealing damage and reducing the Armor of enemies who stand on it.
E.tooltip: Nasus ignites a spirit flame, dealing {{ initialdamage }} magic damage. Enemies in the area lose {{ e2 }}% Armor and take {{ totaldotdamage }} magic damage over {{ e3 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Nasus}} unleashes a spirit fire at the target location that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The fire remains for a few seconds, {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|reducing enemy armor}}}} and continually dealing {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nasus''' unleashes a spirit fire at the target location, granting {{tip|sight}} of the {{tt|area|centered at the location}} for {{tt|{{fd|2.5}} seconds|Estimated}} and, after a {{rutngt|0.25}} delay, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within.
wiki_detail.description2: The fire then remains for 5 seconds, dealing {{as|magic damage}} each second to enemies within and inflicting them with {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|armor reduction}}}}, lingering for 1 second.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Magic Damage Per Tick|{{ap|10 to 34}} {{as|(+ 12% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|10*10 to 34*10}} {{as|(+ 120% AP)}}}}
{{st|Armor Reduction|{{as|{{ap|30 to 50}}% of target's armor}}}}
wiki_detail.notes: * The sight is granted when the cast time completes, the damage happens after an additional delay.

R.name: Fury of the Sands
R.description: Nasus unleashes a mighty sandstorm that batters nearby enemies. While the storm rages, he gains increased Health, Attack Range, damages nearby enemies, has a reduced cooldown on Siphoning Strike, and gains bonus Armor and Magic Resistance.
R.tooltip:
Nasus becomes empowered in the sandstorm for 15 seconds, increasing his maximum Health by {{ bonushealth }} and Armor and Magic Resistance by {{ initialresistgain }}.

While the storm rages, nearby enemies take {{ damagecalc }} of their maximum Health as magic damage each second and Siphoning Strike has a {{ qcdr*100 }}% reduced Cooldown.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Nasus}} empowers himself for some time, gaining bonus size, {{sti|health|{{as|health}}}}, {{sti|armor|{{as|armor}}}}, {{sti|mr|{{as|magic resist}}}}, and {{sti|range|attack range}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: While empowered, ''{{ai|Siphoning Strike|Nasus}}'' has reduced {{sti|cooldown}}, and '''Nasus''' creates an [[aura]] that continually deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies based on {{as|their '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Nasus''' empowers himself for 15 seconds, gaining {{sti|health|{{as|'''bonus''' health}}}}, {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}}, {{sti|mr|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}}}}, increased [[size]], and {{sti|range|50 '''bonus''' attack range}} for the duration.
wiki_detail.description2: While '''Nasus''' is empowered, he deals {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds to nearby enemies, capped at 240 per second, and ''{{ais|Siphoning Strike|Nasus}}'' {{sti|cooldown}} is halved.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage Per Tick|{{as|{{ap|1.5 to 2.5}}% {{as|(+ {{fd|0.5}}% per 100 AP)}} of target's '''maximum''' health}}|Total Magic Damage|{{as|{{ap|1.5*30 to 2.5*30}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|0.5*30}}% per 100 AP)}} of target's '''maximum''' health}}}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|400|Increased by 0.8 per 1% bonus size beyond Nasus' base radius of 80 units}}
wiki_detail.spellshield:
|notes   = 
* ''Fury of the Sands' ''bonus health is not affected by {{tip|Grievous Wounds}} and '''Nasus''' retains it once the duration ends.
